metadata.title: StockEdge: Stock Market App
metadata.description: StockEdge is a SEBI-regulated stock market analytics platform, designed for traders & investors seeking a structured approach to understanding the Indian share market and mutual funds. Whether you focus on swing trading, positional trading, or long-term investing, the app helps you research, track, and analyse stocks and mutual funds using reliable data and practical market tools. No matter your experience level, it supports how you actually interact with the market. It brings together stock screeners, market analysis, portfolio insights, market news, mutual fund analytics, and institutional data in one place. Explore our Key Features: 1. Stock Market • Indices: Track all major NSE & BSE indices to understand broader market direction and long-term trends. • Trending Stocks: Monitor daily top gainers, top losers, high-volume stocks, 52-week high-low, and all-time high-low stocks, with price updates every minute. • FII-DII Activity: Analyse FII-DII data in cash, futures, options. • Deals: Track bulk deals, block deals, insider and SAST deals. • IPOs: Get insights into upcoming, ongoing, and listed IPOs. • Mutual Fund Analytics: Discover top-performing mutual funds, explore investment themes, and track AMCs. • Complete Stock Analysis: Access stock insights, news, stock price charts, financials, results, NSE option chain data, and Mutual Fund holdings. 2. Stock Analytics • Screener: Access 500+ stock screeners across weekly, monthly, 52-week, and all-time price action. • Sector Analytics: Deep-dive into sector and industry performance, tracking sales, EBITDA, profits, and changes in FII & DII, and promoter shareholding. • Chart Patterns: Use AI-driven detection for 15+ key stock chart patterns. • Trading Strategies: Get predefined combination screeners segregated into specific categories, which can help Traders & Investors to identify potential stock opportunities. • Sector Rotation: Identify trending sectors and momentum stocks for trading and momentum investing. • Investor Portfolios: Track investments of market veterans like Rakesh Jhunjhunwala, Vijay Kedia and 250+ leading investors. 3. My Portfolio • Portfolio Sync: Connect your broker (Zerodha, Groww, Angel One). • Screener: Save your favourite scans in one place. • Watchlists: Create unlimited watchlists to track your favourite stocks and sectors. • Smart Alerts: Set price and news alerts so you never miss a move. Who is StockEdge For? For Beginners Start your journey with confidence. • Learn stock market and mutual fund basics, technical analysis, and financial ratios. • Use simple scans like Top Gainers and 52 Week High to spot trends. • Simple in-house indicators like Edge Meter Score and Momentum Scans make it easy to understand stock strength and trend direction at a glance. For Traders Find your next trade faster. • Breakout scans for resistance and moving average signals. • F&O data with Open Interest and Put to Call Ratio (PCR) trend. • Technical indicators like RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Bands. For Investors Build long-term wealth. • Investment Ideas: Access a curated list of investable stocks and mutual fund themes based on strong fundamentals and key technical levels. • Fundamental scans for High ROE, Low Debt, consistent dividend-paying stocks, and top-performing mutual funds. Download StockEdge now to invest and trade with confidence. Regulatory & Legal StockEdge Fintech Private Limited (formerly known as Kredent InfoEdge Private Limited) is a SEBI-registered Research Analyst and Investment Advisor. Research Analyst SEBI Registration Number – INH300007493. Investment Advisor SEBI Registration Number – INA000017781. Registered Office Address: J-1/14, Block - EP and GP, 9th Floor, Sector V Saltlake City, Kolkata, WB 700091 IN. CIN: U72400WB2006PTC111010
metadata.description_html:
StockEdge is a SEBI-regulated stock market analytics platform, designed for traders & investors seeking a structured approach to understanding the Indian share market and mutual funds. Whether you focus on swing trading, positional trading, or long-term investing, the app helps you research, track, and analyse stocks and mutual funds using reliable data and practical market tools. No matter your experience level, it supports how you actually interact with the market. It brings together stock screeners, market analysis, portfolio insights, market news, mutual fund analytics, and institutional data in one place.

Explore our Key Features:

1. Stock Market

• Indices: Track all major NSE & BSE indices to understand broader market direction and long-term trends.
• Trending Stocks: Monitor daily top gainers, top losers, high-volume stocks, 52-week high-low, and all-time high-low stocks, with price updates every minute.
• FII-DII Activity: Analyse FII-DII data in cash, futures, options.
• Deals: Track bulk deals, block deals, insider and SAST deals.
• IPOs: Get insights into upcoming, ongoing, and listed IPOs.
• Mutual Fund Analytics: Discover top-performing mutual funds, explore investment themes, and track AMCs.
• Complete Stock Analysis: Access stock insights, news, stock price charts, financials, results, NSE option chain data, and Mutual Fund holdings.

2. Stock Analytics

• Screener: Access 500+ stock screeners across weekly, monthly, 52-week, and all-time price action.
• Sector Analytics: Deep-dive into sector and industry performance, tracking sales, EBITDA, profits, and changes in FII & DII, and promoter shareholding.
• Chart Patterns: Use AI-driven detection for 15+ key stock chart patterns.
• Trading Strategies: Get predefined combination screeners segregated into specific categories, which can help Traders & Investors to identify potential stock opportunities.
• Sector Rotation: Identify trending sectors and momentum stocks for trading and momentum investing.
• Investor Portfolios: Track investments of market veterans like Rakesh Jhunjhunwala, Vijay Kedia and 250+ leading investors.

3. My Portfolio

• Portfolio Sync: Connect your broker (Zerodha, Groww, Angel One).
• Screener: Save your favourite scans in one place.
• Watchlists: Create unlimited watchlists to track your favourite stocks and sectors.
• Smart Alerts: Set price and news alerts so you never miss a move.

Who is StockEdge For?

For Beginners

Start your journey with confidence.
• Learn stock market and mutual fund basics, technical analysis, and financial ratios.
• Use simple scans like Top Gainers and 52 Week High to spot trends.
• Simple in-house indicators like Edge Meter Score and Momentum Scans make it easy to understand stock strength and trend direction at a glance.

For Traders

Find your next trade faster.
• Breakout scans for resistance and moving average signals.
• F&O data with Open Interest and Put to Call Ratio (PCR) trend.
• Technical indicators like RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Bands.

For Investors

Build long-term wealth.
• Investment Ideas: Access a curated list of investable stocks and mutual fund themes based on strong fundamentals and key technical levels.
• Fundamental scans for High ROE, Low Debt, consistent dividend-paying stocks, and top-performing mutual funds.

Download StockEdge now to invest and trade with confidence.

Regulatory & Legal

StockEdge Fintech Private Limited (formerly known as Kredent InfoEdge Private Limited) is a SEBI-registered Research Analyst and Investment Advisor. Research Analyst SEBI Registration Number – INH300007493. Investment Advisor SEBI Registration Number – INA000017781. Registered Office Address: J-1/14, Block - EP and GP, 9th Floor, Sector V Saltlake City, Kolkata, WB 700091 IN. CIN: U72400WB2006PTC111010
